overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair exploring a futuristic urban plaza during sunset. The character walks through an open plaza with distinctive curved architecture, meets a companion NPC, and traverses an elevated walkway passing large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with curved glass architecture

events.description: character turns around and heads back toward the green staircase structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing by the curved glass structure, then turning to head toward the stairs

entered.detail: distinctive orange-tinted curved glass and steel structure with multiple arches
large digital advertisement screen displaying 'EL GUAPO' text
mature trees with dense foliage lining the plaza
tall contemporary buildings with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious urban plaza during golden hour, with a distinctive curved glass structure on the left and modern towers visible in the distance. The sun sets behind the architecture, casting long warm shadows across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian approach to elevated walkway stairs

events.description: meets a female companion NPC and begins ascending the stairs together

agents.ego_description: approaching the green staircase with a companion, preparing to ascend to the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: female companion with blonde hair and red arm bands walking alongside the ego character

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with green painted structural elements and orange trim
row of illuminated advertisement screens above the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide green staircase leading to an elevated walkway, meeting a companion NPC. Overhead digital billboards become visible as they begin ascending, while the curved glass structure falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase with overhead billboard structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs alongside the companion, moving toward the covered walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: companion ascending stairs slightly ahead of the ego character

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge with green structural elements connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The character and companion ascend the wide concrete staircase, passing under a series of overhead digital billboards. The entrance to a covered elevated walkway becomes visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with metal fencing

events.description: enters the covered elevated walkway, transitioning from outdoor to enclosed space

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed elevated walkway, following the companion ahead

entered.detail: green metal railings and fencing lining both sides of the walkway
tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' text with pink neon styling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered elevated walkway with metal railings on both sides, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. Through the exit ahead, a large vertical digital billboard becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp emerging to street level with large digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered walkway and begins descending the ramp to street level

agents.ego_description: descending the exit ramp toward street level, passing large illuminated billboards

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying a portrait of a man with text overlay
lower street level with buildings and urban infrastructure becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway and descends a ramp to street level, passing close to massive digital billboards including a prominent 'WET DREAM' advertisement. The scene opens up to reveal the lower urban street level with the city skyline visible in the golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched urban plaza into a series of elevated walkways and back down to the bustling city street level. It begins with the character walking through a spacious plaza during golden hour, where a curved glass structure and distant towers cast long, warm shadows across the pavement. As the character approaches a companion NPC, the scene shifts toward a wide green staircase, leaving the glass architecture behind as overhead digital billboards begin to dominate the view. The camera then follows the pair ascending the concrete stairs and entering a covered walkway, where the natural sunset light transitions into artificial illumination beneath metal railings. Finally, the character exits the covered path and descends a ramp, passing massive advertisements like the Wet Dream billboard before the view opens up to reveal the lower urban street level against the glowing city skyline.
